title: Fixed-Size Circular Buffer
description: Implement a 'CircularBuffer' class with a fixed 'capacity'. Method 'push(val)' adds to the buffer, overwriting the oldest if full. Method 'get_all()' returns items in order.
test_script:
import unittest
from buffer import CircularBuffer
class TestBuffer(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_overwrite(self):
        b = CircularBuffer(3)
        b.push(1); b.push(2); b.push(3); b.push(4)
        self.assertEqual(b.get_all(), [2, 3, 4])
